comment: Hand-derived (token -> expected lemma) pairs for Morphy-lite (PREREG §2.3), verified against index/exc on 2026-07-07. null = OOV (dropped). NOTE: 'men','teeth','running','words','ate','better' are themselves WordNet index lemmas (ate=goddess Ate; better=n/v/a/r), so exact-match-first (§2.3 step 1) preempts exception/detachment; this supersedes the illustrative '(men->man, running->run)' examples in PREREG §7 (see §9 amendment 2026-07-07). Clean exc cases: wolves,mice,geese,feet,children,went. Detachment cases: dogs,cats,boxes,abilities,walks,helped,jumped.
